# Chapter 9: Databases  (~100 pp)
- 9.1 Relational model (15) · 9.2 SQL engineering-first (12) · 9.3 Indexes and query plans (15) · 9.4 Transactions, ACID, isolation levels (18) · 9.5 NoSQL: key-value, document, columnar, graph (15) · 9.6 Replication and consensus preview (10) · 9.7 Failure section: silent data corruption, lost updates, isolation-level confusion (15)

**Archetype**: balance (consistency), failure. **Project**: design schema for a real domain; benchmark three query patterns. **Exercises**: 30.
